name: mdxnet-infer
summary: Inference-only MDX23C TFC-TDF drum source separation
license:
MIT License
        
        mdxnet-infer's model.py is a verbatim-ported, inference-only subset of
        ZFTurbo's Music-Source-Separation-Training (https://github.com/ZFTurbo/Music-Source-Separation-Training),
        whose MDX23C TFC-TDF architecture originates from KUIELab's sdx23
        (https://github.com/kuielab/sdx23/). Both are MIT licensed; both are
        credited below alongside OpenMIRLab's packaging of this inference-only port.
        No model weights are bundled with this software — see README.md for weights
        provenance and licensing, which is separate from the code license below.
